message:
✨ Add static SEO landing pages for search engine crawlers (#1724)

Add 6 crawlable static HTML landing pages served to search engine bots
via the seo-meta edge function. Human visitors continue to get the
normal React SPA. This gives Google rich, indexable content for our
highest-value routes.

Landing pages:
- / (main overview) — multi-cluster Kubernetes management
- /clusters — multi-cluster management features
- /missions — AI-powered CNCF project installer & troubleshooting
- /gpu-reservations — GPU management & namespace allocation
- /deploy — multi-cluster workload deployment
- /security — Kubernetes security dashboard

Edge function changes:
- Detect search engine crawlers by user-agent
- Serve static landing pages instead of empty SPA shell for crawlers
- Exclude /landing/* from edge function processing

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
